gamelayout.title: Game Center
gamelayout.tip: Press ESC to quickly exit the current game
gamelayout.snake_desc: A classic retro game that will challenge your reflexes.
gamelayout.gomoku_desc: Strategy game, the player who connects five in a row wins.
gamelayout.2048_desc: Slide the tiles and try to create a tile with the number 2048.
gamelayout.minesweeper_desc: Uncover all the safe squares without detonating any mines.
gamelayout.tetris_desc: A classic puzzle game where you stack falling blocks.
gamelayout.wordle_desc: A word guessing game where you have six attempts to guess a five-letter word.
gamelayout.memory_desc: A matching game where you need to find pairs of identical cards.
gamelayout.othello_desc: A strategy game where players take turns placing discs on a board.
gamelayout.xiangqi_desc: A traditional Chinese strategy game played on a grid.
gamelayout.klotski_desc: A sliding block puzzle game where you need to move blocks to create a path.
